description.value: Aura faint conjuration; CL 1st; Slot none; Price 50 gp; Weight 1/2 lb. DESCRIPTION Prized by slavers as an affordable way to stop a captive from bleeding to death, a dose of wound paste acts as a stabilize spell when slathered on a dying creature. Applying wound paste is a standard action that provokes an attack of opportunity. A pot of wound paste contains 5 doses. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, stabilize; Cost 25 gp
